items.title: These 4 ETFs Generate $6,000 a Year in Monthly Income for Retirement Investors
items.description: Four ETFs, each yielding above 6%, each paying monthly. On a $100,000 investment spread across these funds, the income math works out to more than $6,000 a year before taxes.
